$comment: GCS lifecycle policy for the VoxTree audio/video bucket. Apply with `gcloud storage buckets update gs://${GCS_BUCKET_NAME} --lifecycle-file=supabase/storage-lifecycle.json`. Raw voice samples are demoted to Coldline after 30 days and deleted after 365; transient temp uploads are deleted after 7 days; generated clips persist on Standard since they're the user-facing artifact.

rule.$comment: Demote raw voice samples to Coldline after a month — they're rarely re-read once cloning succeeds.
Delete raw voice samples after one year. Cloned voices remain functional via the ElevenLabs voice_id and do not depend on the original file.
Cleanup any transient uploads (mock/tmp) older than a week.
Drop incomplete multipart uploads after 1 day to avoid silent quota leakage.
